description_long: This radiator features a modern, geometric design with a series of diagonal, parallel bars forming a zigzag pattern across its front. The bars are finished in a dark blue color and are mounted on a rectangular, light gray backing panel. The radiator is wall-mounted, with two visible pipe connection points at the bottom, suggesting a dual-entry configuration. The overall structure is slim and projects slightly from the wall, with the bars spaced to allow air circulation for efficient heat dissipation. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made of metal, and the finish is sleek with a slight sheen. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted radiator with diagonal blue bars on a light gray panel, featuring a modern zigzag pattern and dual bottom pipe connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full zigzag pattern of blue bars and the rectangular gray backing, with pipe connections visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the slight projection of the radiator from the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid gray backing panel with no visible bars or connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the mounting offset from the wall.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom, horizontally oriented
